title: lasthenia conjugens
intro: Lasthenia conjugens, also known as San Diego goldfields, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasthenia conjugens include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms associated with respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. This plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine practices.
